---
format: 
  html:
    output-file: Download.html
    link-external-icon: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
engine: knitr
params:
  name: NA
  title: "Water Quality Dashboard"
  year: NA
  date: NA
---

# Suggested Citation

`r params$name`. `r params$title`, `r params$year`. Web. `r params$date`.
